title: Section 44
content: 1 [44. Declaration of assets.—On and from the date of commencement of this Act, every public servant shall make a declaration of his assets and liabilities in such form and manner as may be prescribed.]
footnote: 1 Subs. by Act 37 of 2016, s. 2, for section 44 (w.e.f. 16-1-2014).
